creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
I sent an email to Yarema asking for permission to take maintainership 
of this port.  I'm waiting on a reply or maintainer timeout.  The 
included patch updates the port to v1.1.4 as well as assigns the port to 
me.  Please note there is a companion PR to this one (I don't have the 
PR number yet) that updates mail/dovecot-managesieve to v0.10.6--the 
required version for Dovecot v1.1.4 (the prior version, v0.10.5 only 
works for Dovecot up to v1.1.3).
